name: beads-adoption-plan
title: Analyze how to use Beads in this project
description: Analyze how this project should use Beads as the AI-agent task backend while keeping Trellis as the PRD/research/context workspace.
creator: cses-38
notes: Decision direction: use Beads for AI-agent task graph/ready queue/claiming, keep Trellis task directories for PRD, research, and agent context files. Isolated trial succeeded with /tmp/beads/bd and BEADS_DIR under /tmp. Do not initialize .beads in this repo yet.

meta.recommended_first_step: install bd and run an isolated stealth pilot with BEADS_DIR under /tmp
